title: Use of English – 2023 – Admisión Titular A

questions.prompt: Would you mind... John a hand at tomorrow’s meeting?
Please, stay in your seats until the bell...
Shall we take the poster... the wall? It’s outdated.
Emily invited some friends to her birthday dinner but... declined.
Who is Peter being tutored by in his Study Abroad Programme?
answers: Who is tutoring Peter in his Study Abroad Programme?

questions.prompt: They are going to pay Lisa’s debts as soon as the money gets through.
answers: Lisa’s debts are going to be paid as soon as the money gets through

questions.prompt: They could afford to go to France on holiday by saving every cent.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: How could they afford to go to France on holiday?

questions.prompt: The sound was like a shot. It woke me up.
answers: The sound that / which woke me up was like a shot
The sound was like a shot, which woke me up

questions.prompt: I advise you not to stay in the blazing sun without a hat.
answers: You’d better not stay in the blazing sun without a hat

questions.prompt: I finished all my assignments on Friday so that...
I didn’t notice that the man was in trouble, so I didn’t help him.
answers: If I had noticed that the man was in trouble, I would have helped him

questions.prompt: Everybody here are looking forward to see you.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: Everybody here is looking forward to seeing you

questions.prompt: ‘I’m sorry I have torn your shirt,’ Jake said.
answers: Jake apologised for tearing / having torn my shirt
Jake said (that) he was sorry for tearing / having torn my shirt
Jake said he was sorry for tearing / having torn my shirt

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: money / her / enough / not / bank / was / the / account / in
answers: The money in her bank account was not enough
